creator: ov2k@yahoo.com
text:
Just to be clear, the FreeBSD 14.1-RELEASE was not upgraded from FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE.  It was a fresh install.  I'm also able to reproduce the issue with a mostly default installation without any extraneous customizations of my own.

It could be related to recent ncurses changes.  How would you go about debugging that?  I only set ~/.termcap in my user account, and I find it very unlikely that changing the default root shell would affect that.
